title: Record Single Expense
description: The system shall allow the user to create an expense transaction linked to a mandatory Category and Account, with an amount, user-specified date/time, optional note, and optional receiver.
acceptance_criteria: Saving an expense without a Category is rejected with a validation message
Saving an expense without an Account is rejected with a validation message
The entry UI provides a date/time picker pre-filled with the current system time
The user can modify the date and time to any past or future value
A valid expense is persisted to Room with the selected date and appears in the timeline immediately
